result.evidence: L2: stelnet server enable L3: ssh server-source -i Vlanif10 L5: authentication-mode aaa L6: protocol inbound ssh L7: acl number 2000 L9: info-center enable L10: info-center loghost 10.10.20.10 L11: ntp-service enable
result.reason: 配置中发现相关证据，需结合判定标准人工/AI复核是否完全满足。
result.suggestion: 对照基线判定标准逐项确认当前值、范围、例外和留存记录。
